Facilities - North Coastal
North Coastal Public Health Center
Address:
1701 Mission Ave, Suite 210
Oceanside, CA 92058
Phone:
760-967-4401
Hours:
Open:
 Monday – Wednesday and Friday 8am to 5pm*
Thursday:
 10AM - 5PM
Closed:
 Saturday, Sunday and Holidays
*Clinic hours may be extended to meet community needs.
About:
The North Coastal Public Health Center
 provides access to preventive health services & information.
 Services include Public Health Nurse home visits with emphasis on
 communicable disease control and maternal child health, particularly
 for high-risk families and individuals.
We also provide a daily immunization
 clinic for children and adults who do not have health insurance or
 whose health insurance does not cover vaccinations, Medi-Cal
 participants ages 0-18, Alaskan Native or American Indian ages 0-18,
 and persons 6 month and older in need of influenza (flu) vaccine
 regardless of health coverage. We do not provide travel related
 immunizations. For an appointment, please call
760-967-4401
or for
 self-service please schedule an
on-line appointment
Services:
Immunization/Vaccines
Maternal-Child
 Home Visiting
TB
 Testing
HIV/STD
 Testing
Naloxone
 (sandiegocounty.gov)
Payment Methods:
The Public Health Center is NOW accepting Visa, Mastercard,
 American Express, and Discover as payment methods. The cards may be
 swiped, inserted, or tapped (NFC). Google and Apple Pay are also
 accepted as a method of payment using the NFC tap function.
No fees will be charged to the customer for using their
 credit/debit card.
